title: Noindex 70 URL Audit — Phase 20.6
source: GSC Pages report: Excluded by noindex tag (70 URLs, +54 from 16 on Jun 7)
status: PARTIALLY_EXTRACTED — known patterns documented, full URL list requires GSC Pages drilldown

classification_summary.highly_likely_formula_scenario_cleanup: ~50-55 URLs — V2 formula scenario pruned pages (~2,000 removed, these were noindexed)
classification_summary.highly_likely_tool_duplicates: ~10-15 URLs — tool parameter duplicates intentionally noindexed
classification_summary.emergency_risk_level: LOW — most are intentional noindex from V2 cleanup and tool management

known_patterns.pattern: Formula scenario pages with parameterized URLs pruned during V2 cleanup (~2,000 removed). These were noindexed en masse.
known_patterns.recommended_action: NO ACTION — intentional cleanup. Monitor for important pages accidentally included.

known_patterns.pattern: Thin tool variant pages intentionally noindexed to reduce cannibalization. May include some formula variants with hex-suffixed slugs.
known_patterns.recommended_action: NO ACTION — intentional cannibalization management. Verify no parent calculators accidentally noindexed.

known_patterns.pattern: Pages that may have been accidentally noindexed. REQUIRES VERIFICATION.
known_patterns.recommended_action: URGENT — Verify no important calculator, guide, decision, or blog pages are accidentally noindexed.
known_patterns.verification_method: Cross-reference sitemap URLs with known important pages. Use URL Inspection API to spot-check key pages.

important_pages_safety_check.verification_method: Use URL Inspection API to check coverageState for each important page
important_pages_safety_check.rule: If ANY important page shows 'Excluded by noindex tag', stop and fix IMMEDIATELY

full_extraction_method: Use GSC Pages drilldown via CloakBrowser: navigate to https://search.google.com/search-console/index/drilldown?resource_id=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.qfinhub.com%2F&item_key=CAMY... (noindex item_key needed)
